serviceDescription:
Single-snapshot emotional read on text, wallet activity, or transaction. Returns mood label, 5-axis vector (valence, arousal, intensity), and detected lifestyle signals.
Input: one of text (string), wallet (object), or transaction (object). Optional agentRole for mood_oracle only.

Stateful emotional tracking. Returns the emotional delta (valence, arousal, intensity) vs the prior call for the same subject, plus 7-call history.
Input: subject (stable id: user id, wallet address, or session id) plus one of text, wallet, or transaction.

60-second intervention tuned to the detected emotional state: a specific breath pattern, a written affirmation, a hex color, a song recommendation, and a shareable text card.
Input: one of text (string), wallet (object), or transaction (object).

Role-aware next-best-action for the calling agent. Returns what to do, the right tone, and the right intensity given current emotional state.
Input: one of text, wallet, or transaction, plus optional agentRole (trader / assistant / social / dating / creative, defaults to assistant).
